name: How To Change Instagram Story Background Color
description: Learn To change the background color of your Instagram story, tap on the pen icon, select the color picker tool, choose the desired color and use your finger to paint over the areas you want to change the color. You can also use the eraser tool to remove any unwanted color.
main_title: How To Change Instagram Story Background Color | Synup
richtext:
To change the background color of your Instagram story on mobile: 

1. Tap on the camera icon in the bottom center of the screen to create a new story.

ÔÇì

2. Take a photo or video, or select one from your camera roll.

ÔÇì

3. Tap the pen icon in the top right corner of the screen to access the drawing tools.

ÔÇì

ÔÇì

4. Tap the color swatch in the bottom left corner of the screen to open the color picker.

ÔÇì

5. Select a color from the color picker, or enter a hex code for a specific color.

ÔÇì

 

6. Use the brush tool to draw on the photo or video with the selected color.

You can also use this method to add colored text to your Instagram story. Just tap the "Aa" icon in the top right corner of the screen to access the text tool, then type your message and use the color picker to select the text color.

Optimized background colors make your stories stand out!

Your Instagram stories' backdrop color can help to improve the visual appeal of your material and make it stand out in the user's feed. Developing a consistent visual identity for your brand or personal account can also be beneficial. It can also be simpler for readers to read and interact with your material if you use a background color that contrasts effectively with the text and other story aspects.

ÔÇì

ÔÇì
